Subscribe to my channel: http://bit.ly/OliverGrafTV​ More at http://www.OliverGraf.tv​ Chris Voss is an American businessman, author, and academic. Voss is a former FBI hostage negotiator, the CEO of The Black Swan Group Ltd and co-author of the book Never Split the Difference. In this clip taken from his full Founders Club interview, Chris shows how impactful our emotions are during any type of negotiation!
